title: Steps towards a millimeter VLBI facility at Medicina and Noto
author: Orfei, Alessandro
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: In this talk I present an update about the implementation of the capability to observe up to 116GHz at the 32m Medicina and Noto Italian radio telescopes: available receivers, upgrade of the overall surface accuracy and valuation of the performances.
steps_raw: In this talk I present an update about the implementation of the capability to observe up to 116GHz at the 32m Medicina and Noto Italian radio telescopes: available receivers, upgrade of the overall surface accuracy and valuation of the performances.
